hooks.command: cd /Users/iftype/Projects/Side/who-tech-course/backend && echo '=== Git ===' && git status --short && echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"

python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
try:
    d = json.load(sys.stdin)
    f = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
    if f.endswith('.ts') and 'node_modules' not in f:
        r = subprocess.run(['npx', 'tsc', '--noEmit', '--skipLibCheck'], capture_output=True, text=True, cwd='/Users/iftype/Projects/Side/who-tech-course/backend')
        errs = [l for l in (r.stdout + r.stderr).split('\n') if 'error TS' in l][:8]
        if errs: print('[tsc] ' + '\n'.join(errs))
except: pass
"

cd /Users/iftype/Projects/Side/who-tech-course/backend && mkdir -p .omc/state && git status --short > .omc/state/git-status.txt 2>/dev/null && git diff --stat HEAD > .omc/state/git-diff-stat.txt 2>/dev/null; true
